en.metadata.name: Signature Repair
en.plugin.description: Detect and repair signature errors (e.g. thought_signature) from upstream APIs by stripping signatures and retrying
en.config.enabled.label: Enable Signature Repair
en.config.enabled.description: When enabled, detects signature-related errors in upstream responses and automatically retries with sanitized request body
en.config.statusCodes.label: Status Codes
en.config.statusCodes.description: Comma-separated HTTP status codes that trigger repair (default: 400)
en.config.errorPattern.label: Error Message Pattern
en.config.errorPattern.description: Regex pattern to match in error messages (case-insensitive). Matches against upstream error body message field
en.config.stripThinking.label: Strip Thinking Blocks
en.config.stripThinking.description: Remove thought/thinking parts from the request body before retrying
en.config.dummySignature.label: Dummy Signature
en.config.dummySignature.description: Placeholder signature value used when stripping thought signatures. Google official values: skip_thought_signature_validator or context_engineering_is_the_way_to_go

zh-CN.metadata.name: 签名修复
zh-CN.plugin.description: 检测并修复上游 API 的签名错误（如 thought_signature），通过剥离签名信息并重试实现自愈
zh-CN.config.enabled.label: 启用签名修复
zh-CN.config.enabled.description: 启用后，检测上游响应中的签名相关错误，自动清理请求体并重试
zh-CN.config.statusCodes.label: 状态码
zh-CN.config.statusCodes.description: 触发修复的 HTTP 状态码，逗号分隔（默认：400）
zh-CN.config.errorPattern.label: 错误消息模式
zh-CN.config.errorPattern.description: 匹配错误消息的正则表达式（大小写不敏感）。匹配上游错误响应 body 中的 message 字段
zh-CN.config.stripThinking.label: 剥离思维块
zh-CN.config.stripThinking.description: 重试前从请求体中移除 thought/thinking 部分
zh-CN.config.dummySignature.label: 占位签名
zh-CN.config.dummySignature.description: 剥离签名后使用的占位签名值。Google 官方值：skip_thought_signature_validator 或 context_engineering_is_the_way_to_go
